## Summary

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run ci` (and `npm run ci:prod` for release-related changes)
- [ ] Loaded unpacked `dist/` in Chrome and smoke-tested: pairing, inventory sync, badges (as applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private URLs in the diff
- [ ] If `src/manifest.json` permissions or host permissions changed, I explained why in the Summary above
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, endpoints, or privacy story changed
